name: Visit
_source: s;Man2;Another day, another bandit raid.|Being out here on the border doesn't help. The Council just doesn't give a damn.

s;Woman1;Your Highness? Is that you?|Oh my, oh my, poor Torgen is worried sick about you!|He should be flying over this way with his friends soon.|You'd better tell him that you're alright, y'hear?|He'll definitely be happy to see you safe and sound.
s;Woman1;Wait, aren't you one of Princess Krista's friends?|Torgen's been worried sick about you all!|He should be flying over this way soon, so you'd better go see him, alright?

s;Woman1;*sigh* Still no sign of Princess Krista.|Poor Torgen is going to be so worried{tgm}...|{c:e;Woman1;NormalBlink}{tgm}And those rumors about the Council that have been swirling around{tgm}...{c:e;Woman1;CloseEyes}{tgm} Oh dear, oh dear{tgm}...
s;Peter;This is turning out to be quite a day.|I'll have to get out the big arms. Now, let's see here{tgm}...
